prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 4SN-BLE-UTENSILSET-4PC Product Type: KITCHEN_TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Kitchen Cooking Utensils Baking Supplies Meal Prep Gadgets Tool Set Pastel 4pc Description: The fresh and fun kitchen tools from Beille are the perfect first home essentials cooking utensils. These food-safe kitchen accessories feature a modern design and an eye-catching block colorway finish, while thick rounded handles ensure comfortable maneuvering during all kinds of food prep.

The kitchen utensils from Beille are great for any budding home chef or first-time homebuyer. Add to your arsenal of kitchen accessories or kitchen gadgets and let the cooking and baking begin.

NOTE: Each utensil features a hole at bottom of the handle if hanging storage is desired. Search Terms: cooking baking utensil wooden silicone food prep college essentials house warming gifts home chef kitchen decor cookware sets bakeware organization first beverage pantry storage Features: - 4PC COOKING UTENSILS SET: This kitchen tool set from Beille comes with (2) vegetables peelers, a bottle opener and silicone basting brush; these great kitchen accessories feature modern design in fun, fresh colors, while thick rounded handles ensure comfortable maneuvering during food prep - VEGETABLE PEELER: This kitchen gadgets set includes one Y vegetable peeler and one Lancashire peeler; with its ergonomic design, the Y peeler can peel just about anything with ease, while the Lancashire peeler works more like a knife, is stiff and straight, ideal as a potato peeler - BOTTLE OPENER: A three way bottle opener, there's no bottle top or cap this kitchen gadget won't be able to open! A great item to have in any kitchen and is a first home essentials must have item - SILICONE BASTING BRUSH: The silicone basting brush or grill brush makes basting or applying sauces or other fast and efficient! Easy to clean; Non-stick; high heat resiliant set - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 7.5 x 2.25 x 1.25 inches; Product Weight: 0.55lbs; Materials: Wood, Plastic, Stainless Steel; Food Safe: Yes; Note: Each utensil features hole at bottom of handle if hanging storage is desired === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 4pc Pastel Kitchen Utensils Cooking Baking Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 2 Vegetable Peelers, Bottle Opener, Silicone Basting Brush, Ergonomic Handles, Food Safe, Hanging Storage

openai.title_differentiation: Y Peeler, Lancashire Peeler, Bottle Opener, Silicone Basting Brush, Food Safe, Easy Clean, Hanging Holes
